absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: read shared action-card, completion-state, and archive JSON files
append completed active items to the permanent archive idempotently
remove archived items from the active card and clear completion state
public_purpose: Archives completed action-card items from shared storage and removes them from the active card.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: Action Card Cleanup — archives completed items and cleans the active card.
